ItemId.description: Optional unique identifier. When supplied and found, the existing MCP prompt is updated.

Name.description: Optional stored prompt name alias kept for export parity. Recipe imports primarily use Prompt.Name.

CreatedUtc.description: Optional creation timestamp to preserve during import.

ModifiedUtc.description: Optional last-modified timestamp to preserve during import.

Author.description: Optional author name recorded with the prompt.

Name.description: Unique MCP prompt name. This is the authoritative name used during import.

Title.description: Optional human-readable title displayed by MCP clients.

Description.description: Optional description that explains when the prompt should be used.

Name.description: Unique argument name used inside the MCP prompt template.

Title.description: Optional human-friendly argument title shown to clients.

Description.description: Optional guidance describing what value the argument expects.

Required.description: Whether the client must provide this argument.

Arguments.description: Declared prompt arguments that clients can supply when invoking the prompt.

Prompt.description: The MCP prompt definition to create or update.

Properties.description: Additional prompt metadata. No built-in MCP prompt metadata objects are currently exported here, but extra keys are allowed for future extensions.

Prompts.description: The MCP prompts to create or update.
